facebook.content: "Faith is built in the storm vs. Faith is built in the stillness — which has been true for you? Have you found that your trust in God grows stronger in times of uncertainty or in moments of quiet reflection? We'd love to hear your perspective on this!"
facebook.fullPost:

instagram.content: Faith is built in the storm vs. Faith is built in the stillness — which has been true for you? Do the fiercest battles of your faith forge you, or do calm moments of surrender shape your trust? Share with us.
